calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Continued To Mar-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gayle Oberti appeared in propria persona.

Mrs. Oberti stated that she has some original documents, that both of her grandfathers were born in Italy, and that one of them changed his name from Enrico to Angelo. Mrs. Oberti also stated that she prefers that her grandfather's name appear as Angelo Oberti, and drop Enrico. The court advised Mrs. Oberti to file a declaration regarding the grandfather's name and documenting the research shown. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is continued to March 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Oberti is to send a revised order in a PDF to the probate examiner.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
